title: Standard Check-In
descriptionEn: Welcome a guest, verify their reservation, assign a room, and explain hotel amenities.

title: Noise Complaint
descriptionEn: Handle a guest complaint about noise from a neighbouring room with professionalism.

title: Restaurant Order
titleEs: Tomar un pedido en el restaurante
descriptionEn: Take a full restaurant order, including dietary requirements and wine pairing recommendations.

title: City Tour Recommendations
titleEs: Recomendaciones de visitas por la ciudad
descriptionEn: Recommend local attractions, arrange transport, and handle booking requests.

title: Express Check-Out
descriptionEn: Process an early departure, review the bill, and handle a billing discrepancy.
